title: Zone
description: Defines a high-level layer or zone, typically used to clearly separate different states of data processing, e.g. bronze, silver, gold, semantic.

name.description: Logical name of the zone (e.g., Raw, Core, Curated)

targetName.description: Target system name for the zone (e.g., Bronze, Silver, Gold)

localFolderName.description: Local folder name used in file system structure
